search.query:
index="ssphp_test" sourcetype="access_monitor" earliest=0 latest=now | stats latest(*) as * by link | stats count as secret_count, values(*) as * by repo_owner, repo_name
| join repo_owner repo_name [| inputlookup ssphp_github_repo_ownership_details.csv | eval org_repo='organisation'."/".'repo_name' | eval ssphp.service.contacts.cost_centre_owner_email=coalesce('ssphp.service.contacts.cost_centre_owner_email','ssphp.service.contacts.cost_centre_owner_email{}') | table ssphp.service.portfolio, ssphp.service.service_line, ssphp.service.product, ssphp.service.id, contributors_*, ssphp.service.iso, ssphp.service.rolls_up_to, rolls_up_to_manager, *service.contacts*, *cost_centre*, * | rename ssphp.service.* as * | eval repo_owner=organisation] | table repo_owner repo_name secret_count rolls_up_to_manager portfolio service_line product contributors_dfe_email * | sort 0 - secret_count

| search repo_owner=$tkn_repo_owner|s$
| eval full_repo_name='repo_owner'."|".'repo_name' | table repo_owner, repo_name, secret_count, full_repo_name | sort 0 - secret_count

| eval full_repo_name=$tkn_selected_repo|s$, repo_owner_selected=mvindex(split('full_repo_name',"|"),0), repo_name_selected=mvindex(split('full_repo_name',"|"),1)
| where repo_owner='repo_owner_selected' AND repo_name='repo_name_selected'
| eval lf1=" ", lf2="
"
| eval contacts.cost_centre_owner_email=coalesce('contacts.cost_centre_owner_email','contacts.cost_centre_owner_email{}'), rolls_up_to_manager=mvsort(mvdedup(mvappend('rolls_up_to_manager','rolls_up_to')))
| eval Service="Porfolio:".'lf1'.'portfolio'.'lf2'."Service Line:".'lf1'.'service_line'.'lf2'."Product:".'lf1'.'product'
| eval dfe_ownership=if(isnotnull('contacts.cost_centre_owner_email') AND 'contacts.cost_centre_owner_email'!="" AND 'contacts.cost_centre_owner_email'!="null" AND 'contacts.cost_centre_owner_email'!="Unassigned","Cost Centre Owner:".'lf1'.'contacts.cost_centre_owner_email',null()),
dfe_ownership=if(isnotnull('contacts.financial_business_partner_email') AND 'contacts.financial_business_partner_email'!="" AND 'contacts.financial_business_partner_email'!="null" AND 'contacts.financial_business_partner_email'!="Unassigned",mvappend('dfe_ownership',"Financial Business Partner:".'lf1'.'contacts.financial_business_partner_email'),'dfe_ownership'),
dfe_ownership=if(isnotnull('contacts.hosting_provider_email') AND 'contacts.hosting_provider_email'!="" AND 'contacts.hosting_provider_email'!="null" AND 'contacts.hosting_provider_email'!="Unassigned",mvappend('dfe_ownership',"Hosting Provider:".'lf1'.'contacts.hosting_provider_email'),'dfe_ownership'),
dfe_ownership=if(isnotnull('contacts.product_owner_email') AND 'contacts.product_owner_email'!="" AND 'contacts.product_owner_email'!="null" AND 'contacts.product_owner_email'!="Unassigned",mvappend('dfe_ownership',"Product Owner:".'lf1'.'contacts.product_owner_email'),'dfe_ownership'),
dfe_ownership=if(isnotnull('iso') AND 'iso'!="" AND 'iso'!="null" AND 'iso'!="Unassigned",mvappend('dfe_ownership',"ISO:".'lf1'.'iso'),'dfe_ownership'),
dfe_ownership=if(isnotnull('rolls_up_to_manager') AND 'rolls_up_to_manager'!="" AND 'rolls_up_to_manager'!="null" AND 'rolls_up_to_manager'!="Unassigned",mvappend('dfe_ownership',"Rolls Up To Manager:".'lf1'.'rolls_up_to_manager'),'dfe_ownership')
| eval dfe_ownership=mvjoin('dfe_ownership','lf2')
| rename contributors_dfe_email as "GitHub Contributors", dfe_ownership as "DfE Ownership" | table Service, "GitHub Contributors", "DfE Ownership",

index="ssphp_test" sourcetype="access_monitor" earliest=0 latest=now | stats latest(*) as * by link ```| stats count as secret_count, list(*) as * by repo_owner, repo_name ```
| join repo_owner repo_name [| inputlookup ssphp_github_repo_ownership_details.csv | eval org_repo='organisation'."/".'repo_name' | eval ssphp.service.contacts.cost_centre_owner_email=coalesce('ssphp.service.contacts.cost_centre_owner_email','ssphp.service.contacts.cost_centre_owner_email{}') | table ssphp.service.portfolio, ssphp.service.service_line, ssphp.service.product, ssphp.service.id, contributors_*, ssphp.service.iso, ssphp.service.rolls_up_to, rolls_up_to_manager, *service.contacts*, *cost_centre*, * | rename ssphp.service.* as * | eval repo_owner=organisation] | table repo_owner repo_name secret_count rolls_up_to_manager portfolio service_line product contributors_dfe_email * | sort 0 - secret_count | eval full_repo_name="DFE-Digital|early-years-foundation-reform", repo_owner_selected=mvindex(split('full_repo_name',"|"),0), repo_name_selected=mvindex(split('full_repo_name',"|"),1)
| eval full_repo_name=$tkn_selected_repo|s$, repo_owner_selected=mvindex(split('full_repo_name',"|"),0), repo_name_selected=mvindex(split('full_repo_name',"|"),1) | where repo_owner='repo_owner_selected' AND repo_name='repo_name_selected'
| table detector_name, valid_from_trufflehog, valid_now, secret_redacted, link

| eval full_repo_name=$tkn_selected_repo|s$, repo_owner_selected=mvindex(split('full_repo_name',"|"),0), repo_name_selected=mvindex(split('full_repo_name',"|"),1)
| where repo_owner='repo_owner_selected' AND repo_name='repo_name_selected'
| fillnull value="-" archived, created, default_branch, description, dfe_centrally_owned, last_updated, repo_status, visibility | fields archived, created, default_branch, description, dfe_centrally_owned, last_updated, repo_status, visibility
| eval lf1=" ", lf2="
" | eval "Repo Details"="Description:".'lf1'.'description'.'lf2'."Created:".'lf1'.'created'.'lf2'."Last Updated:".'lf1'.'last_updated'.'lf2'."Visibility:".'lf1'.'visibility'.'lf2'."Archived:".'lf1'.'archived'.'lf2'."Default Branch:".'lf1'.'default_branch'.'lf2'."DfE Centrally Owned:".'lf1'.'dfe_centrally_owned'.'lf2'."Tagging Status:".'lf1'.'repo_status' | table "Repo Details"
